Home.heroTitle: Yaskrava — smart savings for drivers in one app
Home.heroSubtitle: Fuel cashback, discounts on car services, financing and useful services — right in your phone.

cards.fuelText: Refuel at partner networks and get cashback to your in-app balance (CZK).
cards.autoTitle: Car services — care & parts with discounts
cards.autoText: Detailing, parts and accessories with partner discounts and clear conditions.
cards.financeText: Solutions for new and used cars + history checks (CarVertical discount).
cards.insuranceText: All insurance options in one place — simple and fast.
cards.otherText: OSVČ registration, accounting, legal help, telecom offers and more.
cards.walletText: Balance in CZK, top-ups, savings, favorites and notifications.

Home.step1Text: Send a request — we’ll help you activate the app and partner offers.
Home.step2Text: Fuel, services, checks — the app guides you with instructions when needed (e.g. Shell).
Home.step3Text: Cashback and discounts are tracked in one place with a clear CZK balance.
Home.ctaStripSub: Fuel cashback and discounts — one app, one balance.
Home.fleetVisualText: Current inventory, financing-friendly offers and a direct route into leasing for each vehicle.

Footer.disclaimer: Legal templates are provided for informational purposes and must be reviewed by a qualified Czech lawyer.

About.title: About YASKRAVA
About.subtitle: A technology platform that brings driver savings into one mobile app.
About.missionText: Yaskrava is an ecosystem for drivers: fuel cashback, discounts on car services, financing and useful services — with a clear CZK balance and simple navigation.
principles: Make everyday driving costs more affordable and manageable
Unify partners in one convenient system
Give users control over spending with a transparent balance
Build a clear and easy digital service

cards.speedText: Fuel, services, financing and more — one login, one place.
cards.transparencyText: Cashback and savings are tracked with a clear CZK balance.
cards.complianceText: Partner offers with clear terms. We keep expanding the ecosystem.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Fuel cashback, car services, financing and useful services — in one coherent ecosystem.

partners.autoKelly: Up to 60% discount on car products.
partners.shell: Fueling via the app + built-in instruction “How Shell works”.
partners.orlen: Cashback up to 2.40 CZK per liter.

Services.partnersDisclaimer: Offers depend on partner conditions and may change. Final terms are shown in the app.

cards.leasingText: Personal and business leasing with clear monthly payments, down payment options and document checklist.
cards.vehiclesText: We keep a curated list of cars that are already on the площадка and those that are on the way.
cards.fuelText: Discounted fuel with reporting options — convenient for both individuals and fleets.
cards.supportText: We guide you through documents, approvals and handover — step by step.

Fleet.title: Vehicles
Fleet.subtitle: Cars that are already on site — and cars that are on the way to the площадка.
Fleet.inTransitText: Reserved or being delivered. Details and timelines are provided on request.
Fleet.onSiteText: Available for review and the next steps in the leasing flow.
Fleet.placeholder: New vehicles will appear here soon.

Fuel.title: Fuel — cashback in the app
Fuel.subtitle: Refuel at partner networks and get cashback to your CZK balance.

shell.text: Refuel via the app. Includes a built-in instruction “How Shell works”.
how: Open the app and select Shell.
Follow the fueling flow and pay in the app.
Cashback is credited to your CZK balance.

orlen.text: Cashback up to 2.40 CZK per liter (depends on conditions).

Fuel.disclaimer: Cashback rates and partner conditions may change. Final terms are shown in the app.

Career.title: Careers
Career.subtitle: We build a fast, compliant leasing experience. Join us.

roles.salesText: Own the client journey: requirements → offer → documents → handover.
roles.opsText: Vehicles in transit and on-site, timelines, checklists and quality control.

Legal.title: Legal documents
Legal.subtitle: Policies and confirmations required for operating and collecting applications in the Czech Republic.
Legal.privacyText: How we process personal data from forms and applications.
Legal.termsText: Website terms and the scope of provided information and services.
Legal.imprintText: Company identification data and contact information.

LegalDocs.templateDisclaimer: This is a starter template. Replace placeholders and have the text reviewed by a qualified Czech lawyer.
LegalDocs.privacySubtitle: GDPR information and personal data processing terms.

privacy.controller: Controller: YASKRAVA (fill legal name, address, IČO/DIČ, contact email).
privacy.purpose2: Compliance, fraud prevention and record keeping (as applicable).
privacy.rights: You may request access, rectification, deletion, restriction, portability, or object to processing. You can also lodge a complaint with the Czech DPA (ÚOOÚ).

LegalDocs.termsSubtitle: Website terms and general information rules.

terms.scope: These terms govern the use of the website and the information provided on it.
terms.services: We provide information and a request flow. Final leasing terms depend on assessment and partner conditions.
terms.liability: We are not liable for third-party services and reserve the right to update content.

LegalDocs.cookiesSubtitle: Information about cookies and preference options.

cookies.what: We use cookies to keep the site functional and to improve user experience.
cookies.preferences: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Optional analytics should only be enabled with consent (when implemented).

Calculator.title: Leasing calculator
Calculator.subtitle: Estimate monthly payment and total cost with clear assumptions.
Calculator.comingSoon: Calculator is being built now. Next step: premium UI + saving a snapshot into your application.

Apply.title: Application
Apply.subtitle: Send a request and we’ll respond with next steps and a document checklist.
Apply.comingSoon: Application form is being built now (with GDPR consent + CRM storage).

CalculatorUI.downPaymentPrivateHint: Minimum down payment: 20% for private clients
CalculatorUI.downPaymentBusinessHint: Minimum down payment: 10% for company / OSVC
CalculatorUI.disclaimer: Preliminary estimate. Final terms depend on assessment and partner conditions.
CalculatorUI.fixedAprNote: APR is fixed at 15% p.a. Maximum term is 60 months.

ApplyForm.title: Send an application
ApplyForm.subtitle: Leave your contact details. We’ll respond with next steps and required documents.
ApplyForm.calcTip: We’ll use these assumptions as a starting point.
ApplyForm.gdprHint: We store your data only to process your request (GDPR).
ApplyForm.errorGeneric: Could not send the form. Please try again.

AppTeaser.title: Everything for drivers — in one place
AppTeaser.subtitle: Fuel cashback, partner discounts, financing and useful services with a clear CZK balance.
AppTeaser.note: We don’t publish fake download links. Leave a request and we’ll send the correct access steps.

Partner.title: Become a partner
Partner.subtitle: Leave a partner request. After approval we connect your own mini‑CRM and your inventory on your future subdomain.
Partner.intro: This form is for dealerships and business partners who want to work with Yaskrava. It goes to a separate partner pipeline in our CRM.

PartnerForm.title: Partner request
PartnerForm.subtitle: Tell us about your dealership, contact person and inventory. We’ll review the request and contact you with next steps.
PartnerForm.fleetSize: How many cars do you sell?
PartnerForm.messagePh: Tell us about your dealership, financing needs and how fast you want to launch.
PartnerForm.successText: Thanks. Our partner team will contact you soon.
PartnerForm.errorGeneric: Could not send the form. Please try again.

VehicleDetail.subtitle: Vehicle details, preliminary financing and application.
VehicleDetail.financingText: You can leave a financing request for this exact vehicle, and the preliminary calculator already uses its current price.
